question:
Every yumpus is not kind. Each yumpus is an impus. Every impus is not red. Every impus is a numpus. Numpuses are feisty. Each dumpus is not luminous. Numpuses are zumpuses. Each zumpus is cold. Zumpuses are wumpuses. Each wumpus is fruity. Every wumpus is a rompus. Every rompus is spicy. Rompuses are tumpuses. Tumpuses are luminous. Tumpuses are jompuses. Every jompus is not dull. Jompuses are vumpuses. Polly is a numpus.

Is the following statement true or false? Polly is not luminous.
